org.apache.flink.runtime.topology

## Interface PipelinedRegion<VID extends [VertexID](<../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/topology/VertexID.html> "interface in org.apache.flink.runtime.topology"),RID extends [ResultID](<../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/topology/ResultID.html> "interface in org.apache.flink.runtime.topology"),V extends [Vertex](<../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/topology/Vertex.html> "interface in org.apache.flink.runtime.topology")<VID,RID,V,R>,R extends [Result](<../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/topology/Result.html> "interface in org.apache.flink.runtime.topology")<VID,RID,V,R>>

  * Type Parameters:
    `VID` \- the type of the vertex ids
    `RID` \- the type of the result ids
    `V` \- the type of the vertices
    `R` \- the type of the result

All Known Subinterfaces:
    [LogicalPipelinedRegion](<../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/jobgraph/topology/LogicalPipelinedRegion.html> "interface in org.apache.flink.runtime.jobgraph.topology"), [SchedulingPipelinedRegion](<../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/scheduler/strategy/SchedulingPipelinedRegion.html> "interface in org.apache.flink.runtime.scheduler.strategy")

All Known Implementing Classes:
    [DefaultLogicalPipelinedRegion](<../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/jobgraph/topology/DefaultLogicalPipelinedRegion.html> "class in org.apache.flink.runtime.jobgraph.topology"), [DefaultSchedulingPipelinedRegion](<../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/scheduler/adapter/DefaultSchedulingPipelinedRegion.html> "class in org.apache.flink.runtime.scheduler.adapter")

* * *




        public interface PipelinedRegion<VID extends [VertexID](<../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/topology/VertexID.html> "interface in org.apache.flink.runtime.topology"),RID extends [ResultID](<../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/topology/ResultID.html> "interface in org.apache.flink.runtime.topology"),V extends [Vertex](<../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/topology/Vertex.html> "interface in org.apache.flink.runtime.topology")<VID,RID,V,R>,R extends [Result](<../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/topology/Result.html> "interface in org.apache.flink.runtime.topology")<VID,RID,V,R>>

A pipelined region is a set of vertices connected via pipelined data exchanges.

  *     * ### Method Summary

All Methods [Instance Methods](<javascript:show\(2\);>) [Abstract Methods](<javascript:show\(4\);>) Modifier and Type | Method and Description
---|---
`boolean` | `[contains](<../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/topology/PipelinedRegion.html#contains-VID->)([VID](<../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/topology/PipelinedRegion.html> "type parameter in PipelinedRegion") vertexId)` Returns whether the vertex is in this pipelined region or not.
`[V](<../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/topology/PipelinedRegion.html> "type parameter in PipelinedRegion")` | `[getVertex](<../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/topology/PipelinedRegion.html#getVertex-VID->)([VID](<../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/topology/PipelinedRegion.html> "type parameter in PipelinedRegion") vertexId)` Returns the vertex with the specified vertex id.
`[Iterable](<http://docs.oracle.com/javase/7/docs/api/java/lang/Iterable.html?is-external=true> "class or interface in java.lang")<? extends [V](<../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/topology/PipelinedRegion.html> "type parameter in PipelinedRegion")>` | `[getVertices](<../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/topology/PipelinedRegion.html#getVertices-->)()` Returns vertices that are in this pipelined region.

  *     * ### Method Detail

      * #### getVertices

            [Iterable](<http://docs.oracle.com/javase/7/docs/api/java/lang/Iterable.html?is-external=true> "class or interface in java.lang")<? extends [V](<../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/topology/PipelinedRegion.html> "type parameter in PipelinedRegion")> getVertices()

Returns vertices that are in this pipelined region.

Returns:
    Iterable over all vertices in this pipelined region
      * #### getVertex

            [V](<../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/topology/PipelinedRegion.html> "type parameter in PipelinedRegion") getVertex([VID](<../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/topology/PipelinedRegion.html> "type parameter in PipelinedRegion") vertexId)

Returns the vertex with the specified vertex id.

Parameters:
    `vertexId` \- the vertex id used to look up the vertex
Returns:
    the vertex with the specified id
Throws:
    `[IllegalArgumentException](<http://docs.oracle.com/javase/7/docs/api/java/lang/IllegalArgumentException.html?is-external=true> "class or interface in java.lang")` \- if there is no vertex in this pipelined region with the specified vertex id
      * #### contains

            boolean contains([VID](<../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/topology/PipelinedRegion.html> "type parameter in PipelinedRegion") vertexId)

Returns whether the vertex is in this pipelined region or not.

Parameters:
    `vertexId` \- the vertex id used to look up
Returns:
    the vertex is in this pipelined region or not
